signals.npcLine: Market pulse rising, but shadows of dread linger in neon grids.
signals.questPulse: Scan city blocks for rogue data spikes—trends shift fast.
signals.worldFeed: Crypto nodes flicker; volume surges under veiled threats.
signals.clueEvent: Unstable markets stir digital whispers in back alleys.

signals.npcLine: RAVE nodes spike; tastes of digital ecstasy or trap?
signals.questPulse: Intercept RAVE signal, trace source before system collapses.
signals.worldFeed: Stealth operators chase volatile tokens beneath city neon.
signals.clueEvent: Cryptic packets scatter, hinting at underground exploits.

signals.npcLine: ASTEROID rides a comet trail; eyes locked on drifting gains.
signals.questPulse: Decode ASTEROID chatter, unlock hidden transaction nodes.
signals.worldFeed: Asteroid token trail leads to decayed cyber hubs.
signals.clueEvent: Data fragments whisper on forgotten market edges.

signals.npcLine: BTC still king of the grid, but fear gnaws at its core.
signals.questPulse: Secure BTC vaults; enemies prowl for sudden strikes.
signals.worldFeed: Old guard cryptocurrencies shudder as new threats emerge.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted alerts signal upcoming market turbulence.

signals.npcLine: CHIP’s whispers barely reach beyond broken circuits tonight.
signals.questPulse: Probe CHIP micro-transactions; unknown operators active.
signals.worldFeed: Silent tokens in a noisy city struggle for notice.
signals.clueEvent: Fractured signals hint at emerging low-profile actors.
